## Headroom Learned Patterns
*Auto-generated by `headroom learn` on 2026-06-14 ‚Äî do not edit manually*

### Build & Verification Commands
*~600 tokens/session saved*
- Test: `CGO_ENABLED=1 go test ./...` (renderer/bmo-pak need CGO+SDL; `CGO_ENABLED=0 go test ./...` only compiles the pure-Go packages and errors on the SDL ones). Race checks: `CGO_ENABLED=1 go test -race ./...`
- Lint: `golangci-lint run ./...` ‚Äî run after every change before committing
- Local build: `CGO_ENABLED=1 go build ./...` (full build needs CGO for SDL; `CGO_ENABLED=0` fails on `internal/renderer`. The pure-Go `cmd/render-faces` does build under `CGO_ENABLED=0`.)
- Cross-compile + package release: `./scripts/release.sh`
- Deploy to device: `./scripts/deploy.sh`
- Tail device logs: `./scripts/debug-logs.sh`

### golangci-lint v2 Config Format
*~600 tokens/session saved*
- Exclusions belong under `linters.exclusions.rules` (NOT `issues.exclude-rules` which is a v1 key that causes `config verify` to fail with a jsonschema error)
- Validate with `golangci-lint config verify` before committing `.golangci.yml` changes

### ADB Device Paths
*~500 tokens/session saved*
- App log: `/mnt/SDCARD/.userdata/tg5040/logs/BMO.txt`
- Config: `/mnt/SDCARD/.userdata/tg5040/BMO/config.json`
- Pak binary: `/mnt/SDCARD/Tools/tg5040/BMO.pak/bin/tg5040/bmo-pak`
- Kill app: `adb shell "kill -9 \$(adb shell 'ps | grep bmo-pak | grep -v grep | head -1 | awk \"{print \$1}\"')"` ‚Äî `pkill -f bmo-pak` does NOT reliably kill the process

### Docker Go Cache Permissions
*~500 tokens/session saved*
- Docker build containers write `.go_cache/` as root, causing permission errors in subsequent host commands
- `.go_cache/` is gitignored; fix with `chmod -R u+w .go_cache` or move aside with `mv .go_cache .go_cache.bak`
- Never commit or `rm -rf` the cache without checking ownership first

### Key File Paths
*~400 tokens/session saved*
- Push-to-talk wiring: `cmd/bmo-pak/ptt_shared.go` (NOT `internal/assistant/ptt_shared.go` ‚Äî that path does not exist)
- SVG face assets: `internal/face/assets/` (neutral, blink, listening, thinking, speaking, smile, concerned, sleeping, laugh, whistle, look_around)
- Config prompts helpers: `internal/config/prompts.go`

### Python Environment
*~300 tokens/session saved*
- `PIL`/`Pillow` is NOT installed on the dev machine ‚Äî `import PIL` will fail
- For binary image inspection (PNG/BMP) use stdlib `struct` + `zlib`; for screenshots use `convert` (ImageMagick)

### WebFetch Model Compatibility
*~250 tokens/session saved*
- `WebFetch` (and `WebSearch`) fail with extended-thinking models (e.g. `claude-fable-5`) with error `thinking.type.disabled`
- Fall back to `curl -sL <url>` in a Bash tool call whenever the active model is fable-5 or another non-standard model

<!-- headroom:learn:end -->
